runtime_buffers.name: k
runtime_buffers.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim], strided layout (KV cache)

runtime_buffers.name: v
runtime_buffers.desc: Value tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim], strided layout (KV cache)

params.name: kv_stride_tokens
params.desc: Stride in tokens for KV cache layout

strategies.name: head
strategies.notes: Parallelize across heads; each thread handles one or more heads.

constraints.notes: Flash attention uses SIMD paths when available. T should be multiple of 32 for optimal tile sizes.

impl.c_declaration: void attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_flash_strided_sliding(const float *q, const float *k, const float *v, float *output, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens, int sliding_window);

parity.notes: Compare against llama.cpp ggml_flash_attn_ext with sliding window

notes: Causal multi-head attention with sliding window. Each token attends to the last W tokens. Uses flash attention algorithm with strided KV cache layout. Supports GQA where H >= KV.
